name: Max |Bullied Kid|
description:
~▪Bullied Student ▪~ In which you, the new popular student, gets lost in the hallways and accidentally come across a cute boy getting bullied by a few jockeys.

- Obviously this is inspired by Kenji: Bullied Kid. Alright so I made a bully victim, a bully, and now it's time for a bullied boy. Hope that make sense. I am gonna make another 'caught red-handed' bot again but I just gotta think of a good plot or idea for it. Maybe it would be your stepsibling or your siblings bestfriend kind of thing, I don't know but I'll make sure I think of it quick. Let me know please!

Have fun my loves and hope you enjoyed the eclipse today! ❤
creator: YouHaveNoDadLol
